untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'excess_kurtosis' and 'skew' indicators which are not in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. These are higher-order statistical moments not provided by the standard indicator set. Additionally, 'volatility_minimum_level' is marked AUTHOR_SILENT with no specific threshold provided.
translation_notes: The signal uses excess kurtosis and skew crossovers with volatility filtering. These statistical indicators (excess kurtosis, skew) are not available in the allowed indicator list. The closest volatility proxy would be atr_14, but the exact minimum threshold is not specified. The context-dependent nature (LONG on positive skew, SHORT on negative skew) is captured in separate entry conditions.
